title: Tender Midnight Craving American Wonton Wrap
description: A tender midnight craving dish featuring wonton skin and umami flavors for an authentic American taste.
instructions: Chop cucumber into thin slices and finely chop red onion. Rinse and slice avocado.
Combine cucumber, red onion, avocado, salt in a bowl for about 5 minutes to draw out the moisture.
Dip wonton skin into water first by soaking them in water for 30 seconds on each side. Lay one wonton skin flat on your work surface.
Place some of the prepared vegetables and green onions onto the center of the wonton skin. Fold over the sides to enclose the fillings, pinching edges together with fingers or a fork to seal.
Heat up a non-stick pan over medium heat for about 1 minute. Place the wrapped wontons seam-side down into the hot pan and fry until golden brown on both sides, approximately 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and serve immediately while still warm.
